texto: For any business decision, there are only two choices: action or inaction. The best option is to take action." - Ramesh Lohia and Jack T. Parker, consultants, iSixSigmaKaizen . In Quality Quotes, February 25, 2015, Knowledge Center, ASQ [ AMERICAN SOCIETY FOR QUALITY]
autor: Ramesh Lohia and Jack T. Parker
explicacao: Citação de Ramesh Lohia and Jack T. Parker sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “For any business decision, there are only two choices: action or inaction. The best option is to …” articula sabedoria, action, inaction em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como inaction e quality.
